title: Sarasota Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sarasota, with a Z-Score of +4.63. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sarasota is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 53%, and the wind speed is 16.2 km/h, which is not providing sufficient relief from the heat. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG indicates that the temperatures are consistently high, with no cooler periods to provide respite.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Sarasota.
